entry.name: PANDION_RR_ACTUATION_STATE_POS_CHECK
entry.description: Position check — pre-OPERATE verification (TAU Mk2 elevon vehicles)

entry.name: PANDION_RR_ACTUATION_STATE_TERMINAL
entry.description: Terminal/shutdown mode — requires power cycle to recover

message.name: PANDION_RR_ENGINE_STATUS
message.field: Emergency shutdown due to hung start

message.name: PANDION_RR_ACTUATION_SYS_STATUS
message.field: IBIT Substate Current When IBIT Running
Bitfield representing IBIT monitors set during IBIT

message.name: PANDION_RR_NEST_DATA
message.field: 0 = vehicle unlocked, 1 = vehicle unlock pending, 2 = vehicle interlocked

message.name: PANDION_RR_PROX_DATA
message.field: Bit 0 = LRF 0 active, Bit 1 = LRF 1 active, etc
Bit 0 = LRF 0 fault, Bit 1 = LRF 1 fault, etc
Bit 0 = LRF 0 trig, Bit 1 = LRF 1 trig, etc
Disabled, Cfg, Waiting for Cmd, Activating, Deactivating, Manual
Off, Pending, Start, Start Delay, Active, Trigger Time Start, Trig Time Active
Trigger Delay (ms) current value from AIFCS

message.name: PANDION_RR_V100_ENGINE_TELEMETRY
message.description: All telemetry from a V100 engine

message.name: PANDION_RR_LOGGING_INFO
message.field: File of the source code reporting the info
Line number of the source code reporting the info

message.name: PANDION_RR_BMS_DATA
message.field: Whether this message comes from the primary or secondary BMS
Voltage on the output of the battery pack load switch
The measured DC input current. A positive value denotes charge current, and a negative value denotes discharge current.
The measured voltage of cell 1 (bottom of cell stack)
The measured voltage of cell 7 (top of cell stack)
Remaining capacity divided by total estimated usable capacity
Minimum voltage on the output of the battery pack load switch
Maximum voltage on the output of the battery pack load switch
Minimum discharge current of the battery pack
Maximum discharge current of the battery pack

message.name: PANDION_RR_NEST_TELEMETRY
message.field: Temperature of the air outside the Nest enclosure
Internal temperature in the upper part of the Nest
Temperature of the Nest exhaust path
Temperature of the Nest bulkhead connector
Torque of the left lid actuator. +/- 0-100%
Position of the right lid actuator. 0 = fully closed. 100 = fully open
Position of the exhaust actuator. 0 = fully closed. 100 = fully open
Current being provided by the Nest to its Vulture. Negative values represent current flowing from Nest to Vulture. Positive values represent current flowing from Vulture to Nest.
Current flowing to or from the Nest’s battery. Negative values denote battery discharge current, and positive values denote battery charge current.
Output of the VOC sensor, if installed. If not installed, 0
Heading obtained from differential GPS estimate
The number of satellites tracked by the rover receiver
The number of satellites tracked by the base receiver
Nest battery test - voltage drop reading

message.name: PANDION_RR_ROUTE_INFO
message.field: Bitmask for validity of data in msg
start value in first launch heading limit, cdeg
end value in first launch heading limit, cdeg
start value in second launch heading limit, cdeg
end value in second launch heading limit, cdeg
start value in land heading limit, cdeg
end value in land heading limit, cdeg
Loiter radius in mm, positive for clockwise, negative for counter-clockwise

message.name: PANDION_RR_TAU_MK2_DATA
message.field: Tau standard telemetry, status field low byte
Tau standard telemetry, status field enabled bits
Tau standard telemetry, status field channel bits
Detailed status bits for the encoder
Detailed status bits for the encoder
Status of the most recent run of the Ratchet IBIT
Status of the most recent run of the Hall Sensor Calibration

message.name: PANDION_RR_ACTUATION_REQUEST_MODE
message.description: Pandion roadrunner request actuation manual mode.

message.name: PANDION_RR_PROX_SENSOR_TEST_MSG
message.description: Pandion roadrunner proximity sensor test message

message.name: PANDION_RR_ACTUATION_TRIM_CONTROL
message.description: Pandion roadrunner actuation trim-focused manual control.

message.name: PANDION_RR_ESAD_MANUAL_POWER_CMD
message.description: Command ESAD power off or on

message.name: PANDION_RR_FUEL_DATA
message.description: Percent of fuel remaining and time to bingo fuel
message.field: A countdown timer started when nearing bingo fuel, indicating that operator action is required.
A countdown timer started when nearing scuttle fuel, indicating that operator action is required.
Estimated time until bingo fuel. This value fluctuates and should not be displayed to the operator.
Estimated time until scuttle fuel. This value fluctuates and should not be displayed to the operator.

message.name: PANDION_RR_LAUNCH_TO_LOITER_ROUTE_REQUEST
message.description: Request to generate a launch route and return its departure waypoint location.

message.name: PANDION_RR_LAUNCH_TO_LOITER_ROUTE_RESPONSE
message.description: Response for a launch route request.

message.name: PANDION_RR_LAUNCH_TO_LOITER_CMD
message.description: Perform automated launch sequence to a loiter point.

message.name: PANDION_RR_RECOVERY_ROUTE_REQUEST
message.description: Request to generate a recovery route and return its rally waypoint location.

message.name: PANDION_RR_RECOVERY_ROUTE_RESPONSE
message.description: Response for a recovery route request.

message.name: PANDION_RR_SCUTTLE_AT_LOCATION_CMD
message.description: Perform automated scuttle at the specified location.

message.name: PANDION_RR_NEST_ID
message.description: Message containing the Nest ID (SN) and slot number (if applicable)
message.field: Nest ID corresponding to the Nest serial number

message.name: PANDION_RR_DECONFLICTION_ZONE
message.field: Nest ID of nest that this deconfliction zone applies to
Start value in first launch heading limit (deg)
End value in first launch heading limit (deg)
Start value in second launch heading limit (deg)
End value in second launch heading limit (deg)
Start value in land heading limit (deg)
End value in land heading limit (deg)
Site specific contingency loiter altitude (WGS-84 meters)

message.name: PANDION_RR_SENS_GND_RADAR
message.description: Pandion roadrunner mission computer ground radar sensor measurement
message.field: Azimuth of detected target in the sensor frame, positive CCW
Elevation of detected target in the sensor frame, positive down
Range rate of detected target in m/s
Signal to noise ratio of the return in dB
ID of the track which the update is associated with
Standard deviation of the elevation angle>
Standard deviation of the range rate measurement
Target position in the ECEF frame, meters
Target velocity in the ECEF frame, mps
Target position estimate covariance in ECEF frame: mxx, mxy, mxz, myy, myz, mzz
Target velocity estimate covariance in ECEF frame: mxx, mxy, mxz, myy, myz, mzz
GPS time that a Range-Velocity Map is received by the radar

message.name: PANDION_RR_SENS_WISP
message.description: Pandion roadrunner mission computer WISP sensor measurement
message.field: ID number of the WISP camera generating the track update
ID for the track which the update is associated with
ID of the track update at the given frame
Counter for the number of detections associated with the track
Target position azimuth rad, elevation rad, range meters
Target velocity azimuth rate rad/s, elevation rate rad/s, range m/s
Signal to noise ratio of WISP detection
Track position in the ECEF frame, meters
WISP position in the ECEF frame, meters
Bounding box in degrees: left, right, top, bottom
Whether or not the WISP track has had its calibration corrected

message.name: PANDION_RR_SENS_TRACK_STATE
message.description: Pandion roadrunner mission computer track state sensor measurement
message.field: GPS Time of last CV detection of track in us
GPS Time of last measurement of the track in us
GPS Time when track was verified in us
Track position estimate covariance in ENU frame: mxx, mxy, mxz, myy, myz, mzz
Track velocity estimate covariance in ENU frame: mxx, mxy, mxz, myy, myz, mzz
Track altitude above ground in m
Track radar cross section in dB
Confidence score of the estimated object class
Origin longitude for track state ENU frame in deg
Origin latitude for track state ENU frame in deg
Origin altitude WGS84 HAE in m

message.name: PANDION_RR_SENS_SILVUS_TOF
message.description: Pandion roadrunner mission computer Silvus sensor measurement
message.field: GPS Time of the ownship at time of sample
GPS Time of the TOF measurement
Node LLA position in deg, deg, m (WGS84)

message.name: PANDION_RR_SENS_GND_LIDAR
message.description: Pandion roadrunner mission computer ground sensor measurement for precision landing
message.field: 0 for Aeva, 1 for Blickfeld, 2 for Ouster
GPS Time of the ground sensor measurement
Target position in the ECEF frame, meters
Target position estimate covariance in ECEF frame: mxx, mxy, mxz, myy, myz, mzz
Azimuth of detected target in the sensor frame, positive CCW
Elevation of detected target in the sensor frame, positive down
Standard deviation of the range measurement
Standard deviation of the azimuth angle>
Standard deviation of the elevation angle>
Node LLA position in deg, deg, m (WGS84)

message.name: PANDION_RR_SENS_FREQ_JAMMER
message.field: Flag TRUE if frequency jammer active

message.name: PANDION_RR_SENS_PROTOCOL_JAMMER
message.field: Flag TRUE if protocol jammer active

message.name: PANDION_RR_TIME_SYNC
message.description: Reports the time of the last sync pulse from pandion, used from setting pandion's clock
message.field: Last Pulse Time in GPS NS
Last Pulse Time is from a Valid and Synced source

message.name: PANDION_RR_MONARCH_STATUS
message.field: GNSS measurements are currently coming from surveyed data
Heading measurements are currently coming from surveyed data
GNSS measurements are currently coming from landing estimate
TS2 sensor measurements are being monitored
Landing sensor measurements are being monitored
NAV_ALGN_SRC mode used for VN heading
Monarch RZLR configuration, specific to vehicle application
Time since last GNSS update for inactive Monarch instance
Time since last Heading update for inactive Monarch instance
Time since last ECEF update for inactive Monarch instance
Time since last LiDAR update for inactive Monarch instance
GNSS measurements are currently coming from landing estimate for inactive Monarch instance
TS2 sensor measurements are being monitored for inactive Monarch instance
Landing sensor measurements are being monitored for inactive Monarch instance

message.name: PANDION_RR_CANBUS_USAGE_MONITOR
message.field: Avg Rx canbus usage in bytes/sec
Peak Rx canbus usage in bytes/sec
Avg Tx canbus usage in bytes/sec
Peak Tx canbus usage in bytes/sec
Avg Rx canbus usage in bytes/sec
Peak Rx canbus usage in bytes/sec
Avg Tx canbus usage in bytes/sec
Peak Tx canbus usage in bytes/sec
Avg Rx canbus usage in bytes/sec
Peak Rx canbus usage in bytes/sec
Avg Tx canbus usage in bytes/sec
Peak Tx canbus usage in bytes/sec

message.name: PANDION_RR_PLAYBACK_COMMAND
message.description: Pandion roadrunner profile playback command message
message.field: Left Engine Speed Percent Thrust Command
Right Engine Speed Percent Thrust Command

message.name: PANDION_RR_LANDING_GEAR_DEPLOY_COMMAND
message.description: Pandion Roadrunner deploy landing gear command

message.name: PANDION_RR_UDP_USAGE_MONITOR
message.field: Avg UDP GCS Rx usage in bytes/sec
Peak UDP GCS Rx usage in bytes/sec
Avg UDP GCS Tx usage in bytes/sec
Peak UDP GCS Tx usage in bytes/sec
Avg UDP QGC Rx usage in bytes/sec
Peak UDP QGC Rx usage in bytes/sec
Avg UDP QGC Tx usage in bytes/sec
Peak UDP QGC Tx usage in bytes/sec
Avg UDP MC Rx usage in bytes/sec
Peak UDP MC Rx usage in bytes/sec
Avg UDP MC Tx usage in bytes/sec
Peak UDP MC Tx usage in bytes/sec
Avg UDP Raw MC Rx usage in bytes/sec
Peak UDP Raw MC Rx usage in bytes/sec
Avg UDP Raw MC Tx usage in bytes/sec
Peak UDP Raw MC Tx usage in bytes/sec

message.name: PANDION_RR_UDP_QOS_MONITOR
message.field: UDP Raw MC Tx dropped bytes
UDP Raw MC Tx dropped count

message.name: PANDION_RR_RFSEEKER_HEARTBEAT
message.description: Pandion Roadrunner RF Seeker Status message

message.name: PANDION_RR_RFSEEKER_TIME_SYNC_STATUS
message.description: Pandion Roadrunner time sync status message

message.name: PANDION_RR_RFSEEKER_NAV_SOLUTION
message.description: Pandion Roadrunner RF Seeker Nav Solution message
message.field: Attitude quaternion (qw, qx, qy, qz) representing rotation from platform frame to ECEF frame (1 0 0 0 is the null-rotation)

message.name: PANDION_RR_RFSEEKER_TARGET_INFO
message.description: Pandion Roadrunner RF Seeker Target Information message
message.field: Number of updates whether the target was detected or not
Number of updates when the target was detected
seeker_detect.detect_num used in measurement update (-1 if no update)

message.name: PANDION_RR_RFSEEKER_BIT_RESULTS
message.description: Pandion Roadrunner RF Seeker BIT Results message
message.field: BIT results as a bit field (BIT_results=0 means seeker passed BIT)

message.name: PANDION_RR_PARAM_VALUE
message.description: Emit the value of a onboard parameter. The inclusion of param_count and param_index in the message allows the recipient to keep track of received parameters and allows him to re-request missing parameters after a loss or timeout. The parameter microservice is documented at https://mavlink.io/en/services/parameter.html. Mirrors PARAM_VALUE, but for a 64-bit value. Additional field to specify stable parameters for the recipient.
message.field: Onboard parameter id, terminated by NULL if the length is less than 16 human-readable chars and WITHOUT null termination (NULL) byte if the length is exactly 16 chars - applications have to provide 16+1 bytes storage if the ID is stored as string

message.name: PANDION_RR_GCS_PARAM_LOAD
message.description: GCS param upload app message that provides parameter definitions, stable and unstable crc. At the end of transmission, confirm_send is use to indicate the vehicle to save provided parameters. For each PANDION_RR_GCS_PARAM_LOAD, the vehicle responds with PANDION_RR_GCS_PARAM_LOAD_ACK message below. The double param_value is encoded in accordance with param_type.
message.field: Onboard parameter id, terminated by NULL if the length is less than 16 human-readable chars and WITHOUT null termination (NULL) byte if the length is exactly 16 chars - applications have to provide 16+1 bytes storage if the ID is stored as string
Confirm complete transmission or send clear cmd( 0: continue sending, 1: save params )

message.name: PANDION_RR_GCS_PARAM_LOAD_ACK
message.description: Vehicle acknowledgment of received parameter load message.
message.field: Onboard parameter id, terminated by NULL if the length is less than 16 human-readable chars and WITHOUT null termination (NULL) byte if the length is exactly 16 chars - applications have to provide 16+1 bytes storage if the ID is stored as string
Result of parameter load (0: success, 1: invalid parameter, 2: stable store error, 3: unstable store error, 4: gen store error)

message.name: PANDION_RR_UPTIME
message.description: Message containing the current uptime as a pandion system tick and tick rate

message.name: PANDION_RR_ROUTE_PLANNING_KINEMATICS
message.description: Roadrunner kinematics used for MC Route Planning
message.field: Tgo time to end far-field guidance
Max tgo to perform exit maneuver

message.name: PANDION_RR_VMS_ROUTE_PLANNING_STATUS
message.field: 0 = Accepting Pharos missions, 1 = Not accepting Pharos missions
0 = Rerouting to contingency loiter, 1 = Rerouting to TSE
Min. turn radius scale factor used for determining KOZ buffer size

message.name: PANDION_RR_DECONFLICTION_VALIDITY_DATA
message.field: No deconfliction data has been received or no data received in the last 5 seconds
Deconfliction provided ID does not match the Nest reported ID
The landing latitude and longitude are 0
The landing latitude and longitude are outside the inner geofence
The contingency loiter violates the inner fence
The contingency loiter radius violates the inner fence
The contingency loiter violates a keep-out-zone
The contingency loiter radius violates a keep-out-zone
The launch location latitude, latitude, and altitude are 0
The launch location violates the inner fence
Scuttle location is enable and violates the inner fence or a keep-out-zone
Scuttle location is enable and violates the inner fence or a keep-out-zone
Scuttle location is enable and violates the inner fence or a keep-out-zone
Scuttle location is enable and violates the inner fence or a keep-out-zone
Scuttle location is enable and violates the inner fence or a keep-out-zone

message.name: PANDION_RR_HOST_NAV_ATT_STATE
message.description: Host Navigation and Attitude State Message.

message.name: PANDION_RR_HOST_NEST_CAL
message.field: Platform lever arm for X direction calibration parameter
Platform lever arm for Y direction calibration parameter
Platform lever arm for Z direction calibration parameter

message.name: PANDION_RR_CYCLE_WCET
message.field: Average execution time percent multiplied by 10
